columnHint.zone:
Plant zone / functional area code (e.g. SE0, BCP, STAX).
• Matches the Zone column in customer Excel and zone master data.
• Empty cells inherit the value from the row above (Excel vertical merge).
• Read-only in the app — edit zone in Excel and re-seed, or change downstream masters.
columnHint.machineList:
Equipment or line item grouped under the zone (e.g. Agitator, Batch Mixer).
• Describes machines listed on the process line, not necessarily the single M/C used for PM.
• Fill-down like Zone when the cell is blank.
• Read-only anchor column in Phase 2 edit.
columnHint.sapCode:
SAP maintenance plan identifier (Maintenance plan / SAP Code / Mant).
• Links to IW37N MntPlan and scheduled PM work.
• Phase 3 will add a shortcut to filter IW37N by this value.
• Editable when you have master-data.write.
columnHint.mntplan:
Maintenance plan number used in SAP PM (MntPlan).
• Same business meaning as SAP Code on many EE/ME sheets.
• Used to match open work orders and IW37N imports.
• Editable; changes are logged in change history.
columnHint.tasklist:
General task list / operation group code from SAP PM.
• Pairs with PM list text when publishing to task list (Phase 4).
• May differ between EE and ME for the same sheet name.
• Editable with audit log.
columnHint.legacy:
Legacy work-center / craft code (e.g. SE0-MI-EE, PK1-HI-ME).
• Identifies which trade team owns the PM row.
• Used for manhours, permissions, and WO routing.
• Keep aligned with Work Center master.
columnHint.machine:
M/C — the specific machine or functional location receiving PM.
• Narrower than Machine List: the asset the plan applies to.
• Maps toward equipment / functional location in SAP flows.
• Editable cell value.
columnHint.pmlist:
PM task description as written in customer Excel (often Thai).
• Shown verbatim — not translated by the app.
• Appears on work orders and confirmation screens after publish.
• Use multi-line editor (double-click); long text is not truncated.
columnHint.days:
Interval in days between PM executions.
• Drives calendar scheduling together with freq (day) on some sheets.
• Editable; compare with SAP strategy after publish.
columnHint.freqDay:
PM frequency in days (column may appear as freq (day) or Frequency on PK sheets).
• Packing sheets use Frequency / Type / Craft instead of some EE/ME columns.
• Editable numeric/text cell.
columnHint.min:
Planned minimum man-hours for the PM task.
• Often merged vertically in Excel — blank cells repeat the value above.
• Used in manhour planning and utilization reports.
• Editable.
columnHint.man:
Planned manpower (people) or man-hour column (Man / Man hour).
• May rowspan like Min when merged in Excel.
• Feeds manhour and team sizing checks.
• Editable.
columnHint.actCode:
Maintenance activity type / Act Code (ZB02).
• SAP activity type for costing and confirmation.
• Should match Activity type (MAT) master.
• Editable.
columnHint.type:
Packing PM type classification (PK sheets).
• Part of the PK column set together with Frequency and Craft.
• Describes how the PM is executed on the packing line.
• Editable.
columnHint.craft:
Trade / craft for packing PM (PK sheets).
• Similar role to Legacy on process sheets — which team executes the job.
• Editable.
columnHint.wh:
Planned work hours (WH) for the task on some sheets.
• Used alongside Min/Man for time planning.
• Editable.
columnHint.equipt:
Equipment tag or short equipment reference when the sheet uses an Equipt/Equipment column.
• Cross-check with Equipment master and functional location.
• Editable when present on the sheet.
